args: mkdir -p app/bin && curl -fsSL https://antigravity.google.com/install.sh | BINDIR=./app/bin bash

if (!(Test-Path 'app/bin')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory 'app/bin' }; $env:BINDIR='.\app\bin'; Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Force; $tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP ('antigravity-install-' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString() + '.ps1'); Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri https://antigravity.google.com/install.ps1 -OutFile $tmp; try { & $tmp } finally { Remove-Item $tmp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
